title: The Giant Hat Disruption Equation
alternateTitles: affectionate SNL Celebrity Jeopardy homage origin
formula: TF = ((H x M x S) + W^2 + C) / (R + F)
formulaLatex: TF = ((H \times M \times S) + W^{2} + C) / (R + F)
formulaPlaintext: TF equals  open parenthesis open parenthesis H times M times S close parenthesis  plus W squared plus C close parenthesis  divided by  open parenthesis R plus F close parenthesis
tagline: Big hat + wrong confidence + zero format respect = legendary disruption.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.
theoreticalEcho: comedy timing, incongruity, callback structure, and rule-of-three craft. This is an influence/analogy note, not a scientific validation claim.
culturalScope: Drafted from a Western/English-language comedy, drama, game-design, and reflective-writing context; not universal and not clinical.
temporalNote: A static symbolic snapshot of a dynamic process; future versions may add temporal and relational state models.
reflectionPrompt: What invisible rule or format is being gloriously violated, and how does the audience response become part of the bit?
exampleApplication: A contestant keeps answering with impossible confidence while the host tries to preserve order; the joke lands because format respect drops while commitment rises.
posterVisual: Featured cowboy-hat cameo, game-show podium, host irritation chart, oversized hat arrows.
visualMotif: marquee bulbs, fake lab stickers, timing clocks, giant hat chaos
boundaryNote: Symbolic craft pattern only; not measurement.
misuseWarning: Do not use this as a cruelty machine or conflict-escalation manual. The project is for craft, play, reflection, and humane storytelling.
license: CC BY 4.0 recommended for formula text/data; poster art may use separate terms.

title: The Deadpan Delta
formulaPlaintext: D equals A divided by E

theoreticalEcho: comedy timing, incongruity, callback structure, and rule-of-three craft. This is an influence/analogy note, not a scientific validation claim.

temporalNote: A static symbolic snapshot of a dynamic process; future versions may add temporal and relational state models.
